name: terraform-multicloud-orchestrator
description: Plan-only, failure-mode-first Terraform orchestrator for AWS, Azure, GCP and OCI. Diagnoses state, identity, blast-radius and compliance risks before generating HCL.

interface.shortDescription: Plan-only Terraform authoring across AWS, Azure, GCP and OCI.
interface.longDescription: Diagnoses identity churn, blast radius, state migration and compliance risks before generating or refactoring Terraform. Uses per-cloud references and plan-only validation; never applies or destroys infrastructure.
defaultPrompt: Author a secure AWS VPC module.
Review this Terraform plan for replacement risk.
Refactor this module without state churn.
